text: Whereas sovereignty over the entire Universe belongs to Almighty Allah alone, and the authority to be exercised by the people of Pakistan within the limits prescribed by Him is a sacred trust; ...

title: The Republic and its territories
text: (1) Pakistan shall be a Federal Republic to be known as the Islamic Republic of Pakistan... (2) The territories of Pakistan shall comprise: provinces, Islamabad Capital Territory, and such States and territories as may be included in Pakistan.

title: Islam to be State religion
text: Islam shall be the State religion of Pakistan.

title: Elimination of exploitation
text: The State shall ensure the elimination of all forms of exploitation and the gradual fulfillment of the fundamental principle, from each according to his ability to each according to his work.

title: Right of individuals to be dealt with in accordance with law, etc.
text: (1) To enjoy the protection of law and to be treated in accordance with law is the inalienable right of every citizen...

title: Loyalty to State and obedience to Constitution and law
text: (1) Loyalty to the State is the basic duty of every citizen. (2) Obedience to the Constitution and law is the inviolable obligation of every citizen...

title: High treason
text: Any person who abrogates or attempts or conspires to abrogate, subvert or suspend the Constitution by use of force or by any other unconstitutional means shall be guilty of high treason.

title: Definition of the State
text: The State is defined in Article 7... (text truncated for sample)

title: Laws inconsistent with or in derogation of Fundamental Rights to be void
text: Any law, or any provision of law, found to be inconsistent with the fundamental rights shall, to the extent of such inconsistency, be void.

title: Security of person
text: Security of person is guaranteed subject to law.

title: Safeguards as to arrest and detention
text: Safeguards as to arrest and detention include right to be informed, right to legal counsel, production before magistrate, etc.
